reference: Hello, as you say, it could well be due to over-exercising your abdominal wall musculature. I suggest you take your physical workout gently and under medical supervision. Regarding the hunch, meeting a sports medicine specialist or orthopedic surgeon to correct your posture would certainly be of help. I hope this works.
text: Hello, as you say, it could well be due to overexercising your abdominal wall muscle. Sir, I suggest you take your physical workout gently and under medical supervision. Regarding the hunch, meeting a sports medicine specialist or orthopedic surgeon to correct your posture would certainly be of help. I hope this works.
